orders_paid_proof_check.name: orders_paid_proof_check
orders_paid_proof_check.value: "orders"."status" not in ('paid', 'partially_refunded', 'refunded') or ("orders"."transaction_hash" is not null and "orders"."block_number" is not null and "orders"."block_hash" is not null and "orders"."log_index" is not null and "orders"."confirmed_at" is not null)

payment_attempts_submission_boundary_che.name: payment_attempts_submission_boundary_check
payment_attempts_submission_boundary_che.value: "payment_attempts"."status" not in ('submission_started','submitted','submitted_unknown','executing','confirming','paid') or "payment_attempts"."submission_started_at" is not null

refunds_confirmed_proof_check.name: refunds_confirmed_proof_check
refunds_confirmed_proof_check.value: "refunds"."status" <> 'confirmed' or ("refunds"."transaction_hash" is not null and "refunds"."block_hash" is not null and "refunds"."confirmed_at" is not null)

split_payments_paid_proof_check.name: split_payments_paid_proof_check
split_payments_paid_proof_check.value: "split_payments"."status" <> 'paid' or ("split_payments"."split_digest" is not null and "split_payments"."original_order_key" is not null and "split_payments"."token_address" is not null and "split_payments"."intent_digest" is not null and "split_payments"."transaction_hash" is not null and "split_payments"."block_number" is not null and "split_payments"."block_hash" is not null and "split_payments"."log_index" is not null and "split_payments"."confirmed_at" is not null)

withdrawals_confirmed_proof_check.name: withdrawals_confirmed_proof_check
withdrawals_confirmed_proof_check.value: "withdrawals"."status" <> 'confirmed' or ("withdrawals"."transaction_hash" is not null and "withdrawals"."block_hash" is not null and "withdrawals"."confirmed_at" is not null)
